violations.claim: VIOLATION: Division by Zero at divide
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: division-by-zero
; LINE: 13
; VIOLATION: Division by Zero at divide
(declare-const a Int)
(declare-const b Int)
(assert (= b 0))
(check-sat)
violations.judge_note: property-judge confirmed bug: In JavaScript/TypeScript, `a / b` with `b = 0` returns `NaN` (not an error), but the claim treats division by zero as a runtime violation like a compiled language would.
